segments.text: Shout for joy, O barren woman, who bears no children; break forth in song and cry aloud, you who have never travailed; because more are the children of the desolate womanthan of her who has a husband,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: [^198] says the LORD.

Enlarge the site of your tent, stretch out the curtains of your dwellings, 
do not hold back. Lengthen your ropes and drive your stakes in deep. [^199]
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
For you will spread out to the right and left; your descendants will dispossess the nations
and inhabit the desolate cities.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Do not be afraid, for you will not be put to shame; do not be intimidated, for you will not be humiliated. For you will forget the shame of your youth and will remember no more the reproach of your widowhood.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For your husband is your Maker—the LORD of Hosts is His name—the Holy One of Israel is your Redeemer; He is called the God of all the earth.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For the LORD has called you back, like a wife deserted and wounded in spirit, like the rejected wife of one’s youth,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: says your God.
For a brief moment I forsook you, but with great compassion I will bring you back.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: In a surge of angerI hid My face from you for a moment, but with everlasting kindness I will have compassion on you,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: says the LORD your Redeemer.

For to Me this is like the days of Noah, [^200] when I swore that the waters of Noah
would never again cover the earth. So I have sworn that I will not be angry with youor rebuke you.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Though the mountains may be removed and the hills may be shaken, My loving devotion will not depart from you, and My covenant of peace will not be broken,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: says the LORD, who has compassion on you.
O afflicted city, lashed by storms, without solace, surely I will set your stones in antimony and lay your foundations with sapphires. [^201]
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
I will make your pinnacles of rubies, your gates of sparkling jewels, 
and all your walls of precious stones.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Then all your sons will be taught by the LORD, [^202] and great will be their prosperity.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
In righteousness you will be established, far from oppression, 
for you will have no fear. Terror will be far removed, for it will not come near you.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: If anyone attacks you, it is not from Me; whoever assails you will fall before you.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
Behold, I have created the craftsman who fans the coals into flame
and forges a weapon fit for its task; and I have created the destroyerto wreak havoc.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: No weapon formed against you shall prosper, and you will refute every tongue that accuses you. This is the heritage of the servants of the LORD, and their vindication is from Me,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: declares the LORD.
